## Profile

Quantitative cancer epidemiologist building reproducible causal-inference pipelines on large-scale observational health data, including electronic health records (EHR). PhD-trained in causal inference and evidence triangulation, currently working on pancreatic and bladder cancer at CNIO. Experienced with g-methods, negative controls, and Mendelian randomization across international cohorts (HELIX, ATHLETE). Author of CRAN R packages (forrest, orcidtr) and lead developer of the **etverse** ecosystem for reproducible and transparent causal inference.
